description: §38.13.4 — a bare `broadcast()` primitive call inside a `watches=` channel body fires E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-BROADCAST. The feed is fed by the database change capture, NOT by app-side fan-out; it has no app broadcast (a tighter sibling of E-CHANNEL-004).
rationale: §38.13.4: a `watches=` channel SHALL NOT call `broadcast()` / `disconnect()` — the feed is fed by the database capture, not by app broadcast. Such a call SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-BROADCAST.
